name: AMGEN INC
summary: PART I Amgen Inc. (including its subsidiaries, referred to as Amgen, the Company, we, our or us) discovers, develops, manufactures and delivers innovative medicines to fight some of the worlds toughest diseases. We focus on areas of high unmet medical need and leverage our expertise to strive for solutions that dramatically improve peoples lives, while also reducing the social and economic burden of disease.
